overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district in Night City. The player character moves through covered walkways, past holographic billboards and food stalls, and under concrete overpasses with a distinct cyberpunk aesthetic featuring vibrant neon signage and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with hotel entrance and large red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete stairs and hotel entrance with prominent red neon signage overhead

entered.detail: large vertical red neon sign with geometric patterns mounted on building facade
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
building entrance with green and orange facade lighting and glass doors
modern yellow and black benches arranged in front of the building
industrial metal roof structure with exposed beams extending over walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban plaza at night, dominated by a large red neon hotel sign and concrete stairs on the left. The player walks forward past yellow benches toward a building entrance with green and orange lighting, approaching the beginning of a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food stall

events.description: enters fully covered walkway with industrial metal ceiling and fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor passing a purple neon-lit food stall with Japanese lanterns

entered.detail: industrial metal ceiling with exposed trusses and hanging fluorescent tube lights
small food vendor stall illuminated with bright purple neon lighting and counter stools
traditional paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging above the food counter
large digital screen displaying red and white graphics on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow covered walkway with an industrial metal ceiling and fluorescent lighting. A purple neon food stall with Japanese lanterns appears on the left, while a digital billboard glows red on the right wall. The corridor is empty of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with street crossing and vehicle traffic

events.description: exits narrow corridor into wider underpass area with visible street and traffic
red car drives past on the street visible through the underpass opening

agents.ego_description: walking through underpass approaching and crossing the yellow marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street visible through the underpass columns

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure with orange accent lighting
multi-lane street with moving vehicle traffic visible through the underpass
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with green walk symbols
large holographic advertisements and screens visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide underpass with massive concrete support pillars and a view of the street beyond. The player crosses a yellow striped crosswalk while cars pass by on the road visible through the structure. Digital billboards glow across the street, and the space transitions from enclosed corridor to semi-open transit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stand with outdoor dining area under overpass

events.description: approaches brightly lit Girus food stand with outdoor seating and potted plants

agents.ego_description: walking past the Girus food stand and glancing at the vendor working behind the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor leaning on the counter inside the Girus food stand

entered.detail: retro-style diner food stand with red and blue neon signage reading GIRUS and outdoor counter
round metal tables with stools arranged in front of the food stand
large potted tropical plants flanking the entrance to the food stand

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a brightly lit retro diner-style food stand named Girus, featuring red and blue neon signage and outdoor seating with potted plants. A vendor is visible working behind the counter. The area remains under the overpass structure but feels more commercial with the dining setup.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with holographic billboards

events.description: continues into covered walkway with large pink holographic billboard becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor passing other pedestrians and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward the camera on the left side

entered.detail: large vertical holographic billboard with pink neon displaying WATSON WHORE text
bright orange safety railings lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a covered walkway where pedestrian traffic increases. A large pink holographic billboard reading WATSON WHORE dominates the left wall, while orange railings line the right. The player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban district, transitioning from a quiet plaza into a dense, commercial transit corridor. It begins in a semi-covered plaza dominated by a red neon hotel sign, moving past yellow benches toward a building entrance with green and orange lighting. As the camera enters a narrow covered walkway, the environment shifts to an industrial space featuring a purple neon food stall with Japanese lanterns and a glowing red digital billboard. The scene then opens into a wide concrete underpass where the camera crosses a yellow striped crosswalk, passing a retro diner-style food stand named Girus with red and blue signage. Finally, the path leads back into a crowded covered walkway, where the space becomes more vibrant with a large pink holographic billboard and an increase in pedestrian traffic.
